query: SELECT entityType, entityId, fieldName, sourceLanguage, targetLanguage, LEFT(originalText, 50) as originalPreview, LEFT(translatedText, 80) as translatedPreview, translatedBy, createdAt FROM translations WHERE entityType = 'tour' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4TdGiyGWHynzTjR.2f22c070361b --database D3XjbQ67JpFf2y4FWefWHw --execute SELECT entityType, entityId, fieldName, sourceLanguage, targetLanguage, LEFT(originalText, 50) as originalPreview, LEFT(translatedText, 80) as translatedPreview, translatedBy, createdAt FROM translations WHERE entityType = 'tour' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
